ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-23-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-26-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Continued To Jan-26-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for executor Alvin Samson (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing for Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Wrobel reported that the estate property had recently been sold and that the proceeds from escrow were in the process of being distributed. He requested a 45-day continuance to allow time to file a petition for final distribution.

The Court continued the matter to January 26, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody/; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Continued To Nov-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-22-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Continued To Jul-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel appeared by zoom for Alvin Samson.

Mr. Wrobel presented oral argument to support his petition that Probate Code 6124 does not apply. The court informed Mr. Wrobel that it will not grant his petition today and advised him to submit a petition that follows the intestate theory. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to July 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 at Mr. Wrobel's request to allow him time to amend his petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
